title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd!
